description: Signature engine contract. Defines how certification artifacts are cryptographically signed. Signatures are the final gate before merge is permitted in child repos.

signing_protocol.key_source: Garage signing key stored in secrets manager (Doppler). Environment variable: GARAGE_SIGNING_KEY. Never committed to any repository.

payload_construction.method: Canonical JSON serialization of certification fields, excluding auditor_signature itself.
payload_construction.serialization: Fields serialized in declared order. No whitespace. No trailing commas. Deterministic output.

signing_conditions: Valid audit report with classification PASS (audit_status == PASS).
Sanitation report exists with sanitation_status PASS (sanitation_passed == true).
mount_receipt.heir_valid == true (HEIR identity record validated during mount).
Signing key available from secrets manager.
Doctrine version in work packet matches current doctrine_version.json.
refusal_conditions: Signing key unavailable from secrets manager.
Audit classification is FAIL_EXECUTION or FAIL_SCOPE.

key_management.rotation_schedule: Quarterly, aligned with doctrine review cycle.
key_management.storage: Doppler secrets manager. Variable name: GARAGE_SIGNING_KEY.
key_management.access_control: Signature engine process only. No other agent, workflow, or process may read the signing key.
key_management.revocation_policy: Key revocation invalidates all certifications signed with that key. Affected PRs require re-certification with new key.

verification_inputs: certification.json from .garage/ in child repo PR branch
verification_handoff.verification_output: VALID or INVALID. No intermediate states.
